basics.name: Haohan Zang
basics.summary: Student researcher, competitive musician, and STEM leader at Cedar Park High School (Class of 2028). Currently conducting agentic AI research at Northwestern University.

work.summary: Conducting agentic AI research under Prof. Naichen Shi (Industrial Engineering & Mechanical Engineering). Designing experiments, collecting data, and co-authoring a research publication.

work.position: UT High School Research Academy — X-Plants Project
work.summary: 5-week intensive research endorsement in plant biology.
Conducted computational analysis of gene expression data. Explored mechanisms of gene regulation, replication, and isolation using bioinformatics tools.

references.name: Allison Trueblood, Science Department Head, Cedar Park High School
Christopher Yee, Head Band Director, Cedar Park High School
Dr. Dawn Marie Lindblade-Evans DMA, Professor of Clarinet, University of Central Oklahoma
Mike Lebiras, AYWE Director / Assistant Director of Bands, UT Austin

portfolio.name: Professional Website Platform (WEBS)
portfolio.description: Design-system-first web platform built with React, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Storybook. Features a reusable component library with centralized design tokens.

portfolio.name: Weather Channel Web App
portfolio.description: Weather comparison app built with vanilla JavaScript. Features real-time data fetching, side-by-side weather comparison, and energy efficiency analysis.
